title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Buggy, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Coby, Unknown person #15, Law as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Buggy,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The Bombastic clown!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What in the world?!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Crocodile and Hawk-Eye!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: They're working under buggy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I can't imagine HAWK-eye doing that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he's capable of commanding men like this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Then he's definitely a worthy new emperor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Trust me, he's just a moron.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What the heck happened?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: whatever it was, it seems this cross guild of his...

dialogue.speaker: Coby
dialogue.text: ...is issuing Bounties on Marines...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now those navy dogs have to watch their backs too. The hunters have become the hunted!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Sounds like the world really changed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...while we were in this isolated country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Everyone's done whinin' about their routes, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once we leave Wano, it's every man for himself. I don't want to hear any excuses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: TA-PAT!!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: What the hell is this, Trafalgar?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It's a copy of the Lode FoneGlyph.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You earned it too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It wouldn't be sporting to keep it from you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: So Kaido did have one....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like the one we forced that big mom commander to hand over, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFA!! IF WE WANNA STAY AHEAD IN THE SCRAMBLE FOR THE ONE PIECE,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We oughita get serious about that guy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You wanna go after the man marked by flames?*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: But we've got no leads...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: marked by flames? What are you talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You don't know?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I GUESS WE'RE A STOP A HEAD OF YOU! HAHAHAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Come on! Still it already!!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
